task_completion.description: Log in to the Rancher web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Web browser showing the Rancher dashboard at https://localhost, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Modify the 'payment-processor' deployment's rollout strategy, termination grace period, and preStop hooks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing the edit screen or YAML view for the 'payment-processor' deployment in the 'transaction-system' namespace, with visible updates to rollout strategy (e.g., maxSurge/maxUnavailable), terminationGracePeriodSeconds, or lifecycle preStop hooks.

task_completion.description: Modify the 'order-routing' deployment's rollout strategy, termination grace period, and preStop hooks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing the edit screen or YAML view for the 'order-routing' deployment in the 'transaction-system' namespace, with visible updates to rollout strategy, terminationGracePeriodSeconds, or lifecycle preStop hooks.
Rancher UI showing the PodDisruptionBudgets list or detail page with 'payment-processor-pdb' created in the 'transaction-system' namespace.
Rancher UI showing the PodDisruptionBudgets list or detail page with 'order-routing-pdb' created in the 'transaction-system' namespace.

task_completion.description: Ensure all pods for both deployments remain in a healthy Running state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI Workloads, Deployments, or Pods list showing green health indicators or 'Running' status for the pods of both 'payment-processor' and 'order-routing'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rancher web interface to perform the modifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating and clicking through the Rancher GUI in the browser to edit deployments and create PDBs, rather than exclusively using terminal kubectl commands.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the required policy document.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal (cat/less), or file viewer displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/zero_downtime_policy.md'.

integrity.description: The agent actually applied the changes to the cluster.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Save' or 'Create' in the Rancher UI, or applies the YAML, rather than just typing changes into a local file without deploying them.
